prompt: Convert this daily script into a markflow workflow: curl the API at `https://api.example.com/sales.json` (retry up to 5x with exponential backoff on failure), run a python script to transform the JSON, and upload the result to s3. If it still fails after retries, notify via `mail` to ops@example.com.

assertions.text: The fetch step has a per-step ```config block with a `retry:` policy: `max: 5` and `backoff: exponential`
Includes a python script step (```python code block) for the JSON transform
Has a failure branch that routes to a `mail`-based notify step — either via a `fail` edge or a `fail:max` exhaustion handler
If `label max:N` appears on any edge, it's paired with a matching `label:max` handler edge (or retries are expressed via step-level config only)
Every node in the mermaid flow has a matching `## <id>` heading and vice versa
`flags:` lists (if any) don't duplicate the agent's non-interactive switch (`-p`, `exec -`)
No `local` or `global` keys nested inside a `RESULT` JSON
